SEARCH
Module com.example.formfiller
Package com.example.formfiller

Class FormUtils

java.lang.Object
com.example.formfiller.FormUtils
public class FormUtils extends Object
FormUtils provides utility methods for handling form-related operations, such as updating capacity options based on selected iPhone model, converting date formats, creating toggle buttons with string properties, and validating various input formats like IBAN, IMEI, and email.

  • Method Details

    • updateCapacityOptions

      protected void updateCapacityOptions(javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<String> iphoneModelComboBox, javafx.scene.control.ComboBox<String> capacityComboBox)
      Updates the capacity options in the given ComboBox based on the selected iPhone model.
      Parameters:
      iphoneModelComboBox - the ComboBox containing iPhone models
      capacityComboBox - the ComboBox to update with capacity options

    • dateConverter

      protected void dateConverter(javafx.scene.control.DatePicker date)
      Sets a custom date format for the DatePicker(non american format).
      Parameters:
      date - the DatePicker to set the converter for

    • createFullToggle

      protected javafx.beans.property.StringProperty createFullToggle(javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton firstButton, javafx.scene.control.ToggleGroup toggleGroup, javafx.scene.control.ToggleButton secondButton, String firstText, String secondText)
      Creates a toggle button group with two buttons and a StringProperty to track the selected toggle. It returns a StringProperty because it is more flexible for binding to UI components.
      Parameters:
      firstButton - the first ToggleButton
      toggleGroup - the ToggleGroup to which both buttons will be added
      secondButton - the second ToggleButton
      firstText - the text for the first button
      secondText - the text for the second button
      Returns:
      a StringProperty that reflects the selected toggle's text

    • isValidIban

      protected boolean isValidIban(String iban)
      Validates the given IBAN string with a regex.
      Parameters:
      iban - the IBAN string to validate
      Returns:
      true if the IBAN is valid, false otherwise

    • isValidImei

      protected boolean isValidImei(String imei)
      Validates the given IMEI string with a regex.
      Parameters:
      imei - the IMEI string to validate
      Returns:
      true if the IMEI is valid, false otherwise

    • isValidEmail

      protected boolean isValidEmail(String email)
      Validates the given email string with a regex.
      Parameters:
      email - the email string to validate
      Returns:
      true if the email is valid, false otherwise
